auto_fix.new_finding: OUTCOME_FEEDBACK_MISDIAGNOSIS_CORRECTED: Code review (llm/graduated_rules.py:266, multi_strategy_main.py:3255) confirms record_outcome() IS correctly wired. Root cause of times_correct=0 is architectural: VETO rules block trades from executing so no trade_close fires and record_outcome() is never called for vetoed signals. Penalize rules may also push signals below confidence floor (also blocked). Design gap not a code bug. Fix: implement veto_shadow.json counter-factual evaluation.

root_cause_analysis.mechanism: VETO fires -> signal blocked -> no trade -> no close event -> record_outcome() never called. Design gap not a bug.
root_cause_analysis.shadow_eval_design: Log vetoed signals to veto_shadow.json with entry price + SL. Check counter-factual outcome N hours later. Call record_outcome(won=counterfactual). ~80 lines, 2-3 files.
